---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Cortex
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Open VSCode with...
2. Run command...
3. See error...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste output from the **Cortex** output channel (View > Output > select "Cortex").

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 14.2, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11)
- **VSCode version:** (e.g., 1.90.0)
- **Node version:** (e.g., 20.11.0)
- **Cortex version:** (e.g., 0.1.0)
- **LLM provider:** (e.g., gemini, anthropic, ollama)

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem.
